description: CLI-side typed PostHog event registry (scoped subset). Declares only events the CLI binary actually emits — the 7 cli_* events. The cross-repo drift test in /Users/ordvir/COD/hookmyapp/packages/observability/src/analytics/__tests__/manifest-drift.spec.ts asserts every event here also appears in the monorepo's events.manifest.json with the same property set. Baseline properties (site, environment, workspace_id, days_since_signup) are implicit on every event and injected by super-properties.ts — not listed per-event below.
